summary: The diff shows that `frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx` was added. The file contains a static React functional component with hardcoded JSX, no hooks, no props, no API calls, and uses Tailwind utility classes. The truncated diff shows the Users table card implemented correctly. The file imports only React, uses no .map() or hooks, and follows the Medical Blue theme. All visible acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the evidence available, though the full content is truncated and we cannot verify all 10 table cards are present with complete field listings.
